# Contributing

This is a personal site. I'm not accepting general code or content contributions.

## Found an error?

If you spot a typo, broken link, factual mistake, or outdated information, please open an issue using the **Content Error** template. That's genuinely helpful and I'll address it.

For anything else — design feedback, feature ideas, or just want to get in touch — use the contact info on the [about page](https://lopes.id/about.html).
